title: AI trading platform
author: Ok-North1053
selftext:
I've been interning at this fintech firm, and have been playing around with their software, which isn't exactly an AI bot, but does use AI tech and ML to give signals. The software is called stealth, and if you wanna check it out you can do that at the website: https://stealthtrader.com/

If anyone wants a code for a free trial just message me and I can get you one.

comments.author: Expensive-Rabbit-309
comments.body: Has this been working for you?

replies.author: Ok-North1053
replies.body: Yeah, I'd definitely say it improves the accuracy of my trading, although nothing is 100% accurate

comments.author: Expensive-Rabbit-309
comments.body: Sweet I’ll give it a try thanks!

replies.author: Ok-North1053
replies.body: Great, I'd suggest taking a look at the knowledge base on the website and ask me for a code when you're ready

replies.author: Expensive-Rabbit-309
replies.body: Ok I will for sure, still kinda new to trading but been trying to learn

replies.author: Ok-North1053
replies.body: Great to hear, if you need help with anything just let me know, either here or via dm

comments.author: Sneakers2001
comments.body: I’ll take a promo code and try it. PM sent
